name: Matsumoto-Inc.
summary: Matsumoto-Inc. operates as a printing company in Japan. The company is involved in the commercial printing of school information, leaflets, posters, art books, company information, flyers, booklets, work collections, brochures, envelopes, tickets, memorial magazines, calendars, catalogs, and letterheads, as well as other special printing activities. It also engages in wedding album and other album production, color printing, bookbinding, logotype and symbol mark production, and CI project production activities. The company was founded in 1932 and is based in Kitakyushu, Japan.
